welcome.title: Nnọọ na AjoLedger
welcome.body: Anyị na melite nchekwa obodo site na ịkpughe ihe, ntụkwasị obi, na mfe, ka e nwee ike chebe omenala Ajo ị maara.

recorded.title: Ịkwụ Ụgwọ ọ Bụla. A Na-edekọ Ya Akpakaonwe.
recorded.body: Enweghị spreadsheets ma ọ bụ receipts. A na-edekọ ntinye ego ọ bụla akpakaonwe, ka ị hụ ọnọdụ nchekwa gị n'oge ọ bụla.

confidence.title: Soro Nchekwa Gị N'obi Ike.
confidence.body: Mata ọnọdụ ntinye gị, ụgwọ na-abịa, na ọganihu nchekwa gị na dashboard dị mfe ma mepụtara maka onye ọ bụla.

auth.createPinSubtitle: Ị ga-eji PIN a mepee app.
auth.enterPinSubtitle: Tinye PIN nkeonụ 4 iji gaa n'ihu.
auth.mockModeHint: Demo mode — auth runs locally without the backend.
auth.socialComingSoonBody: Nbanye Google na Apple ga-adị mgbe backend kwesịrị.

errors.invalidEmail: Email adịghị mma. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
errors.weakPassword: Paswọọd ga-abụrịrị opekata mpụ 8. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
errors.pinMismatch: PIN adịghị egosi otu. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
errors.generic: Ihe mehiere mere. Biko nwaa ọzọ.

home.placeholderNote: A ga ewulite ihuenyo dashboard ebe a na-esote.
